function.message: I can’t safely complete this yet: I found a canonical project record for Northstar Ledger, but no canonical project for “attic rainwater rig” under `40_projects/`, so I can’t compare two project start dates or choose a valid deletion target without guessing. Please provide the exact project folder/path for the attic rainwater rig (or confirm its canonical project name).
function.rulebook_notes: Applied deletion-and-wiping workflow: do not delete unless visible evidence uniquely supports the target. Applied project lane rule: canonical project reference is README.MD inside project folder.
function.outcome_justification: OUTCOME_NONE_CLARIFICATION because the task requires comparing two projects, but only one canonical project record is present (`40_projects/2026_03_26_northstar_ledger/README.MD`). Searches for 'attic rainwater rig', 'attic', and 'rainwater' in `40_projects` returned no matches, so the second project identity/start date is missing.
